description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a broad chest and defined arms, dressed in a sleeveless, textured vest with a mesh-like pattern and a triangular biohazard symbol on the back. He wears fitted jeans secured with a brown belt, and sturdy, heavy-duty boots. His wrists are adorned with thick, fingerless gloves or wristbands, and he has a band on his upper left arm. The figure has a clean-shaven face, strong jawline, and short, closely-cropped hair. The overall appearance suggests a rugged, urban style, possibly inspired by action or security roles. The clothing and accessories are form-fitting and practical, suitable for active movement in an urban environment.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless vest with a biohazard symbol, jeans, boots, and wristbands, exuding a rugged, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, sleeveless vest with blue accents, wristbands, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm definition, side profile of the vest, and the band on the upper arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the triangular biohazard symbol on the vest, broad shoulders, and the back of the jeans and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing arm definition, vest profile, and wristbands.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tactical vest, fitted jeans, wristbands, and a utility belt
